misc.title: Nor is this an attempt to refute people's criticism; I can certainly understand why people are critical of the timing. However speaking just for myself I believe that this flashback will play a major
misc.text: Nor is this an attempt to refute people's criticism; I can certainly understand why people are critical of the timing. However speaking just for myself I believe that this flashback will play a major role and was deliberately chosen by Oda for this specific moment or at least, that is what I am hoping for.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1184 People might criticize the timing of the flashback, whether you agree with that or not is a matter of opinion. For my part: I simply think this flashback will play a huge role down the l
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1184 People might criticize the timing of the flashback, whether you agree with that or not is a matter of opinion. For my part: I simply think this flashback will play a huge role down the line; I’d expect a major plot reveal linked to Imu in general.
